UpdateImageMigrationRule.filters.type: Filter type for migration rule resources
UpdateImageMigrationRule.filters.value: Value corresponding to the migration rule resource filter type
UpdateImageMigrationRule.name: Image migration rule name
UpdateImageMigrationRule.override: Whether to overwrite resources in the destination repository
UpdateImageMigrationRule.trigger.type: Migration rule trigger type; only `manual` is supported in image migration scenarios
